docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXE VALET

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, JENKIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXE VALET $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $380.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NIHARIKA BANDI APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,383.52 FILED BY CHAN, JENKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LUXE VALET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED APR-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUXE VALET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUXE VALET
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXE VALET
